'''davogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockization|dockization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockization|dockization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| davogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævegeth|dævegeth]] || [[word:dævegej|dævegej]] || [[word:dævegesh|dævegesh]] || [[word:dævege|dævege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:davovogoth|davovogoth]] || [[word:davovogoj|davovogoj]] || [[word:davovogosh|davovogosh]] || [[word:davovogo|davovogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:davogoth|davogoth]] || [[word:davogoj|davogoj]] || [[word:davogosh|davogosh]] || [[word:davogo|davogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:davofgofth|davofgofth]] || [[word:davofgofj|davofgofj]] || [[word:davofgofsh|davofgofsh]] || [[word:davofgof|davofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davogotho|davogotho]] || [[word:davogojo|davogojo]] || [[word:davogosho|davogosho]] || [[word:davogoko|davogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davogoth|davogoth]] || [[word:davogoj|davogoj]] || [[word:davogosh|davogosh]] || [[word:davogo|davogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davogothol|davogothol]] || [[word:davogojol|davogojol]] || [[word:davogoshol|davogoshol]] || [[word:davogokol|davogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davogoothotho|davogoothotho]] || [[word:davogoojojo|davogoojojo]] || [[word:davogooshosho|davogooshosho]] || [[word:davogooko|davogooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davogothon|davogothon]] || [[word:davogojon|davogojon]] || [[word:davogoshon|davogoshon]] || [[word:davogokon|davogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davogothooro|davogothooro]] || [[word:davogojooro|davogojooro]] || [[word:davogoshooro|davogoshooro]] || [[word:davogokooro|davogokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
